series_metadata.series_title: Lease Records of Lands or Buildings
series_metadata.series_description: Documents stating descriptions of lease payments and other pertinent information on buildings or land rented by agency.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Fulfill requirements of ORC 117.49. 2 yrs expiration of lease ; Electronic: Fulfill requirements of ORC 117.49. 2 yrs expiration of lease
